testcase.name: test_forgot_password_returns_token_in_body

failure.message: AssertionError: Token leaked in body: {'success': True, 'message': 'Token de redefinição gerado. Verifique o console.', 'token': 'snhQMqJq_zNYtKDcGO_UYBF0eQLx7LVPz3Cg1jesocM'} assert False

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_rbac_audit_rc01.py:136: in test_forgot_password_returns_token_in_body assert False, f"Token leaked in body: {body}" E AssertionError: Token leaked in body: {'success': True, 'message': 'Token de redefinição gerado. Verifique o console.', 'token': 'snhQMqJq_zNYtKDcGO_UYBF0eQLx7LVPz3Cg1jesocM'} E assert False

testcase.name: test_create_user_and_check_disciplina_and_areas

failure.message: AssertionError: BUG: disciplina_principal not persisted. Got=None assert None == 'mecanica' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8edcdfe6640>('disciplina_principal') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf8edcdfe6640> = {'created_at': '2026-07-04T19:24:37.768697+00:00', 'deleted_at': None, 'email': 'test_rc01_1783193077@maintrix.com', 'id': 'caee4faa-a994-4346-94ef-699099289180', ...}.get
